    B

    BaseItem - Class in Item
    BaseItem for other item to extends this class
    BaseItem(String, String, Category) - Constructor for class Item.BaseItem
    constructor that initialize value for everyItem by using BaseItem
    BaseItemTest - Class in Item
    Test Class for checking baseItem
    BaseItemTest() - Constructor for class Item.BaseItemTest
     
    BasePlayer - Class in Character
    this class is the baseClass for PlayerType like Gymbro , Nerd , NormalGuy , Otaku that have same method to use with.
    BasePlayer(int, int, int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class Character.BasePlayer
    constructor that initialize value for everyPlayer by using BasePlayer
    BasePlayerProductionTest - Class in Character
    Test Class for checking basePlayer
    BasePlayerProductionTest() - Constructor for class Character.BasePlayerProductionTest

    Building - Class in Screen.BuildingScreen
    Base class for all buildings in the game.
    Building(String) - Constructor for class Screen.BuildingScreen.Building
    Creates a building with the given display name.
